overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk city at night, featuring a character walking through neon-lit streets, crossing intersections, and navigating covered sidewalks with digital billboards. The scene showcases futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and a wet reflective urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city crosswalk beneath elevated highway

events.description: futuristic vehicles pass by on the neon-lit road to the left
stepping off the crosswalk onto the sidewalk curb

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk beneath an overpass, surrounded by other pedestrians

pedestrian with white hood walking alongside

glowing blue neon light embedded in the road surface

tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city crosswalk at night, with the camera following pedestrians across yellow-striped markings. An 'EL GUAPO' billboard dominates the right side while blue neon strips illuminate the road. The character crosses beneath an elevated highway structure alongside other pedestrians, then steps onto the sidewalk curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with street art and graffiti

events.description: passing a large wall covered in colorful pink and blue graffiti art

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall, with traffic visible on the left

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in vibrant pink and blue street art including a large face
metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Moving along a covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, the camera passes a vibrant graffiti wall on the right featuring pink and blue street art. Metal railings separate the walkway from the street where futuristic cars are parked. The El Guapo billboard remains visible in the distance as the character progresses deeper into the covered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with digital advertising screens

events.description: passing benches where pedestrians are seated among planters with red foliage
passing under bright digital billboards illuminating the walkway with colorful light

agents.ego_description: walking past large digital billboards and benches, observing the covered urban walkway

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: massive curved screen displaying 'ALL ACCESS' advertisement with family imagery
white concrete seating along the walkway
large rectangular planter containing trees with pink and red leaves
suspended digital displays hanging from the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens into a covered promenade lined with massive digital billboards, including one displaying 'ALL ACCESS.' Concrete benches and planters with red-leafed trees dot the right side, where a person sits using a device. Overhead screens cast colorful neon light onto the wet pavement as the character moves through this commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open intersection with construction barriers

events.description: approaching an intersection with visible traffic lights and crossing pedestrians
slight turn to navigate around the sidewalk curve near construction barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past yellow construction barriers and vending machines toward an open intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: temporary yellow walls blocking off a construction area
brightly lit purple kiosks or vending machines on the sidewalk
modern glass and steel skyscrapers visible ahead at the intersection
large yellow billboard displaying a beverage advertisement with a face

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an open intersection, with yellow construction barriers lining the left side and purple-lit vending machines on the right. The covered walkway opens up to reveal tall glass office buildings ahead. The camera navigates a slight curve in the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian with a red umbrella, as traffic flows increase approaching the cross street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit city intersection into the sheltered confines of a covered urban corridor. It begins at a futuristic crosswalk, following pedestrians across yellow-striped markings beneath the glow of blue neon strips and a towering El Guapo billboard. As the character crosses under the heavy shadow of an elevated highway structure, the camera transitions from the open road to the edge of the sidewalk curb. The scene then shifts deeper into the covered walkway, passing a vibrant graffiti wall of pink and blue street art while metal railings separate the path from a row of parked futuristic cars. The perspective continues forward through the corridor, with the distant glow of the billboard fading as the environment becomes more enclosed.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial promenade that gradually opens into a bustling urban intersection. It begins along a covered walkway lined with massive digital billboards, where colorful light reflects off wet pavement and red-leafed trees in concrete planters dot the path. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed corridor begins to expand, passing by purple-lit vending machines and yellow construction barriers. The scene then opens up to reveal towering glass office buildings ahead, curving along the sidewalk past a pedestrian with a red umbrella. Finally, the movement leads toward a wide cross street as the flow of traffic increases under the glow of the city.
